OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

ELASTIC_SECURITY_URL.description: The Elasticsearch URL (for alerts) or Kibana URL (for cases).

ELASTIC_SECURITY_KIBANA_URL.description: The Kibana URL (optional, required for cases if different from Elasticsearch URL).

ELASTIC_SECURITY_CA_CERT.description: Path to CA certificate for SSL verification (optional).

ELASTIC_SECURITY_IMPORT_START_DATE.description: Initial import start date in ISO-8601 format (e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z).

ELASTIC_SECURITY_IMPORT_CASES.description: Whether to import security cases (requires Kibana URL).

ELASTIC_SECURITY_ALERT_STATUSES.description: Alert statuses to import (comma-separated). Leave empty to import all.

ELASTIC_SECURITY_ALERT_RULE_TAGS.description: Alert rule tags to filter by (comma-separated). Leave empty to import all.

ELASTIC_SECURITY_CASE_STATUSES.description: Case statuses to import (comma-separated). Leave empty to import all.
